name: lumi-app-finder
description: Find matching iPhone and iPad apps by task, buyer need, and locale, with direct App Store links.
long_description: A transparent first-party discovery tool for 28 verified live Lumi Studio iOS apps across all 50 Apple locales. It matches a user's task to publisher-authored, editorially localized use cases and returns the relevant App Store and detailed guide links. Results are text-relevance matches, not measured search volume, independent reviews, rankings, or user endorsements.

tools.name: find_ios_apps
tools.description: Search the first-party catalog for iOS apps matching a task or buyer need, then return localized context and direct App Store links.
